MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff is not present, on telephone standby per plaintiff's counsel.
Darlene Vigil, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Marvin J. Ramirez, is present.
Philip O'Brien, Esq. is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.

Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
